title: 2.07ct Natural Garnet Halo Ring S925 JR677Y-BeneiceDo
description:
This elegant natural garnet ring, set in high-quality S925 sterling silver, brings timeless beauty with a modern twist. S925 silver is known for its durability, tarnish resistance, and hypoallergenic properties, making it a perfect choice for those seeking comfort without compromising on style.

At the center of this stunning ring is an 8x8mm, 2.07-carat round-cut natural garnet, with its deep red hue symbolizing love and strength. The garnet is surrounded by a halo of round-cut accent stones, enhancing its brilliance. On either side of the band, five round-cut smaller stones are set in a row, totaling 4.56 carats, adding extra sparkle and depth to the design. Weighing 4.61 grams, this ring is both luxurious and comfortable for daily wear, offering a sophisticated look that stands out. available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Natural Garnet Center Stone: 8x8mm, 2.07-carat round-cut garnet with a vibrant red hue.

Halo of Round-Cut Accent Stones: A circle of round-cut stones encircles the center for added brilliance.

Additional Small Accent Stones: A row of five round-cut stones on each side of the band (totaling 4.56 carats) for extra sparkle.

S925 Sterling Silver: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and designed to last.

Comfortable and Elegant: Weighing 4.61 grams, offering a perfect balance of luxury and wearability.

Perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any outfit, this garnet ring is a timeless addition to your jewelry collection.
